rows.name: Goldeen
rows.item: Mystic Water (only available if you're not delaying Petalburg)

stages.title: Before Wattson
notes: Rock Smash items: Big Pearl, Ether, Hard Stone, Heart Scale, Max Ether, Max Revive, Normal Gem, Pearl, Revive, Soft Sand, Star Piece

stages.title: Before Norman
notes: Note that the fossil held rates are 50%!

stages.title: Before Weather Institute

rows.name: Goldeen
rows.item: Mystic Water (5%, now available if you were delaying Petalburg for Marill)

rows.name: Lapras
rows.item: Mystic Water (only available if you're not delaying Sea Mauville, but is 100% guaranteed)

rows.name: Cryogonal
rows.item: Never-Melt Ice (only available if you're not delaying Sea Mauville)

notes: All type resist berries can be obtained from the Berry Master's garden on Route 123 and are farmable from this point onwards

stages.title: Before Winona
notes: Gift Castform from Weather Institute always holds a Mystic Water

rows.name: Aerodactyl
rows.item: Flying Gem (100%, only gem available in-game besides Normal Gem)

rows.name: Hoopa
rows.item: Prison Bottle (100%, but Prison Bottle is a key item in ORAS so not sure how that works)

rows.detail: Steven gives you the Mega Stone for your starter shortly before Winona. The remaining two can be bought off an NPC that appears on Route 114 outside Fallarbor Town after beating Primal Groudon/Kyogre
rows.name: Sceptilite/Blazikenite/Swampertite

rows.detail: Route 119 in front of the house at beginning of route
rows.name: Venusaurite

rows.detail: X is in Fiery Path, requires Strength to access. Y is in Scorched Slab in Heatran room
rows.name: Charizardite

rows.detail: SW corner of Slateport Market. Available as early as post Brawly, but very easy to miss so listing it here!
rows.name: Alakazite

rows.detail: Pacifidlog Town, behind town sign. Requires Surf
rows.name: Kangaskhanite

rows.detail: X is in Littleroot Town, Y is in front of Pokemon League
rows.name: Mewtwonite

rows.detail: Petalburg Woods, south of Moss Rock
rows.name: Scizorite

rows.detail: Lavaridge Town next to sand baths, don't forget to pick up the Togepi egg/Kecleon encounter in the springs while you're here!
rows.name: Houndoominite

rows.detail: Jagged Pass, northeast of southern entrance
rows.name: Tyranitarite

rows.detail: Gift from Wanda for smashing rocks in Rusturf Tunnel
rows.name: Gardevoirite

rows.detail: Lisia fan club, need Altaria in party - available as soon as arriving in Lilycove, but also easy to miss!
rows.name: Altarianite

rows.detail: held by wild Shelgon/Salamence (found in Meteor Falls, need Surf + Waterfall)
rows.name: Salamencite

rows.detail: held by wild Diancie (100% chance), found in Mirage Caves
rows.name: Diancite

rows.detail: post Delta Episode unfortunately, though wild Latios/Latias in Mirage Island spots can hold Soul Dew!
rows.name: Latiasite (RR)/Latiosite (SS)

rows.detail: northeast area of Berry Master's garden Thanks for reading and using this guide, good luck on your runs!
rows.name: Abomasite

mega.subtitle: The following Mega Stones become available after Groudon/Kyogre storyline is completed, and can't be bought in shops. All other Mega Stones should be available through shops or found on the ground as you progress in the story

contest.title: Contest Prizes

rows.name: Super Rank
rows.item: Honey, Soda Pop, Stardust, Sitrus/Razz/Bluk/Nanab/Wepear/Pinap/All confusion pinch berries (Figy, etc)

rows.name: Hyper Rank
rows.item: Heart Scale, Star Piece, Lemonade, Cornn/Magost/Rabuta/Nomel/Spelon/Pamtre/Watmel/Durin/Belue/All EV reducing berries

rows.name: Master Rank
rows.item: Destiny Knot, Comet Shard, Moomoo Milk, All type resist berries (Yache, etc)

rows.name: Any Rank
rows.item: Rage Candy Bar, Shalour Sable, Lumiose Galette, Old Gateau

contest.subtitle: Farmable items from Contests (after completing a Contest, there will usually be 2-3 NPCs close to the entrance that can give any of the following items depending on the chosen Contest rank)

generalNotes: In PKHex, click the box to make Shaymin/Hoopa fateful encounters and you can also get the Gracidea/Prison Bottle key items to transform them!
Genesect drives are obtained from a Street Thug NPC on second floor of Mauville City if you show him a Genesect
Arceus Plates are found scattered underwater. I recommend looking up a guide if you really want them, or at least to get the Pixie Plate to boost Fairy moves
Reveal Mirror for the genies and Keldeo/Meloetta move tutor are both found on first floor of Mauville City
earlyNote: Note that most of these items only have a 5% chance to be held unless stated otherwise.

earlyLearn.detail: Can have Magician as an ability if you're brave enough to go for the Horde encounter
earlyLearn.name: Fennekin

intro: Thief becomes obtainable as a TM upon reaching Slateport, the following doc lists the earliest instance of all available items. No repeats are listed. However, certain Pokemon can learn Thief/Covet prior to obtaining the TM. Here's a list of these pokemon with the level they learn their respective move
